description_long: This pumping station consists of a rectangular, single-story building situated at one end of a long, flat lot. The building features a modern, utilitarian design with a flat roof and several visible windows and doors, likely for operational access. The structure is surrounded by a large expanse of green lawn, bordered on one side by a wide, gray paved area that could serve as a driveway or service road. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete and metal, with glass elements for windows. The paved area and the building's robust construction suggest it is designed for heavy-duty, industrial use, possibly for water or wastewater management. No visible signage, fencing, or warning lights are present, and the exterior is clean and functional.
description: A modern, rectangular pumping station building with a flat roof, set on a large green lot with an adjacent paved area. The structure is made of concrete, metal, and glass, designed for industrial utility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, windows, and the full length of the green lot and paved area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long stretch of green lawn and the paved driveway, with the building at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the building and the full width of the lot, with minimal architectural features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the building's side and the adjacent paved area, with the green lot extending away.
